name: Sidebar + Main

guidance.hotkeys: Navigation hotkeys defined in the essence are keyboard shortcuts. Implement as useEffect keydown event listeners — do NOT render hotkey text in the sidebar UI.
guidance.collapse: Sidebar collapse toggle should be integrated into the sidebar header area (next to the brand/logo), not floating at the bottom of the sidebar.
guidance.breadcrumbs: For nested routes (e.g., /resource/:id), show a breadcrumb trail above the page heading inside the main content area.
guidance.empty_states: When a section has zero data, show a centered empty state: 48px muted icon + descriptive message + optional CTA button.
guidance.section_labels: Dashboard section labels should use the d-label class. Anchor with a left accent border: border-left: 2px solid var(--d-accent); padding-left: 0.5rem.
guidance.section_density: Dashboard sections use compact spacing. Apply data-density='compact' on d-section elements for tighter vertical rhythm than marketing pages.
guidance.page_transitions: Apply the entrance-fade class (if generated) to the main content area for smooth page transitions.

description: Collapsible sidebar with header bar and scrollable main content area. Used by saas-dashboard, financial-dashboard, workbench, ecommerce (account pages).

body.note: Sole scroll container. Page content renders directly here. No wrapper div around outlet.

header.left_content: Breadcrumb — omit segment when it equals page title
header.button_sizing: Buttons in the header use compact sizing: py-1.5 px-3 text-sm (~32px tall). The header is a tight 52px bar — default d-interactive padding is too large here.
header.right_content: Theme toggle (sun/moon icon) + Search/command trigger. Theme toggle toggles light/dark class on html element.

nav.item_content: icon (16px) + label text. Collapsed: icon only, text hidden.
